name: executor-placement-analysis
description: BunSqlExecutor should live in packages/state-api/src/query/execution/ as a new subdirectory. This placement: (1) Keeps execution separate from backends (SqlBackend compiles SQL, BunSqlExecutor runs it), (2) Follows existing pattern where query/ has subdirectories for ast/, backends/, validation/, (3) Allows future executors (e.g., TursoExecutor, D1Executor) to coexist. The execution/ directory establishes clear compile-vs-execute separation.
recommendation: Create new execution/ subdirectory in query/. Define ISqlExecutor interface with execute([sql, params]) signature. BunSqlExecutor implements this using Bun.sql tagged template invocation pattern.
